error.title: Invalid Workfile Subversion
error.description:
## Workfile Subversion contains characters that are not allowed
The **Subversion** field from Workfiles Save-As (the anatomy ``{{comment}}`` token) feeds into the published workfile product name. Spaces and other punctuation cause AYON server product lookups to fail during **Collect Anatomy Instance data** (which queries products by name).
Product name: ``{product_name}``
Suggested Subversion for a new save: ``{sanitized}``
### Allowed characters
Letters and numbers (`a-z`, `A-Z`, `0-9`) and delimiters only: `-`, `_`, `.`
### How to fix
1. Use **Fix Workfile Name** to save a new version with a corrected Subversion automatically, then re-run publish. 2. Or open **Workfiles**, Save-As a new version, and enter a valid Subversion (the Save-As dialog blocks invalid input).
error.detail:
### __Repair action__
The repair action calls `save_next_version` with a sanitized Subversion string. Your current zip on disk is not renamed; a new version is created with a valid basename and metadata.
### __Artist Note__
The Publisher version note (``comment`` on the instance) is separate from Workfiles Subversion and is not restricted by this check.
